title: justicia harleyi
intro: Justicia harleyi, also known as the 'Harley's Justicia', is a species of flowering plant in the Acanthaceae family. It is native to Brazil and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is rich in flavonoids and phenolic compounds, which contribute to its health benefits, including the treatment of respiratory issues, digestive problems, and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Justicia harleyi can be found in the form of tea, capsules, or tinctures, and are often used in folk medicine to alleviate various health issues.
